---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a control or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like to add or change?**
A clear description of the feature.

**Which vehicle / capability?**
<!-- e.g. R1S third-row controls, a specific command, etc. -->

**Is it exposed by Rivian's API?**
If you know the command name or have evidence it's supported, include it here.
Note: features the unofficial Rivian API doesn't expose (e.g. ride height) can't
be added until the command is known.

**Additional context**
